allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); let c=fs.readFileSync\('src/data/sampleData.ts','utf8'\); const count = \(c.match\(/revenue: \\d+,/g\)||[]\).length; console.log\('revenue fields:', count\);")

Bash(node -e "const b=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('C:/EMRACManagementSystem/src/data/CAB-1234.png'\);const ct=b[25];const types={0:'Grayscale',2:'RGB \(no alpha\)',3:'Palette',4:'Grayscale+Alpha',6:'RGBA \(has alpha\)'};console.log\('PNG color type byte:',ct,'=>',types[ct]||'unknown'\);console.log\('width',b.readUInt32BE\(16\),'height',b.readUInt32BE\(20\)\);")
